# wordslab-notebooks-lib.env

## wordslab-notebooks environment variables

WordslabNotebooksEnv class is the entry point to explore the
wordslab-notebooks environment variables.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/wordslab-org/wordslab-notebooks-lib/blob/main/wordslab_notebooks_lib/env.py#L12"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### WordslabNotebooksEnv

>  WordslabNotebooksEnv ()

*Initialize self. See help(type(self)) for accurate signature.*

``` python
env = WordslabNotebooksEnv()
```

### wordslab-notebooks version and platform

``` python
env.version
```

    '2025-12'

``` python
env.platform
```

    'WindowsSubsystemForLinux'
